summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA Engine P1 features: WebSocket real-time updates, zoom preferences storage, and timeframe transition animations. All core P1 features are working correctly.
passed_tests: WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/market responds to connections and subscriptions
Market data endpoints return valid candle data
UI candles endpoint provides chart data
Timeframe buttons have smooth hover/click animations with scale and shadow effects
Active indicator (::after pseudo-element) displays correctly on timeframe buttons
Chart transitions smoothly when switching between 4H → 1D → 7D timeframes
Chart transition animations detected via CSS properties
Zoom preferences are stored in localStorage under 'ta_engine_chart_preferences'
localStorage structure includes symbols and global settings
WebSocket connection test successful from browser
Pattern detection and display functioning (Loose Range pattern detected)
Research interface loads and displays analysis results
